property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) should be created
AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn returns false when no user is set
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn returns true after a user is set
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns false when no user
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns false for userType 1 (regular user)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns true for userType 2 (admin)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns true for userType 3 (super-admin)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false when no user
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false when no division selected
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns true for admin user regardless of division assignment
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false for non-admin user without a matching division
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns true for non-admin user with a matching division
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) initializeAuth (HTTP path) leaves currentUser undefined when server returns null
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) initializeAuth (HTTP path)

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) setUserState sets currentUser and dispatches a store action
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) setUserState

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login POSTs credentials and sets user state on success
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login propagates error on failed login
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout clears user session after successful logout response
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout clears user session even when logout request errors
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logoutDueToInactivity clears the user session
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logoutDueToInactivity

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) getSessionInfo delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) getSessionInfo

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) hasValidSession delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) hasValidSession

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) recordActivity delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) recordActivity

testcase.name: AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path) restores user from localStorage without making an HTTP call
testcase.classname: .AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path)

testcase.name: AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path) calls recordActivity to restart the inactivity timer
testcase.classname: .AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path)

testcase.name: DivisionService should be created
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision sets the selectedDivision signal
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision persists the divisionId to localStorage when seasonId is available
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision updates currentDivision state via setCurrent
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions GETs divisions and updates seasonDivisions signal
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions selects the first division as default when none previously selected
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions preserves an existing selection when it is present in the new data
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions restores selection from localStorage when no existing selection
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions sets seasonDivisions to empty array on HTTP error
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when birthDate is missing
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when gender is missing
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when divisions array is empty
DivisionService findEligibleDivision matches the primary gender and date range
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when gender does not match any division
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when birth date is out of range
DivisionService findEligibleDivision matches the secondary gender in a co-ed division
DivisionService getDivisionMinDate returns September 1st of (currentYear - years)
DivisionService getDivisionMaxDate returns August 31st of (currentYear - years)
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns TR2COED division with correct gender for Trainee 2 Coed
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns SI Boys division with male gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Int Girls division with female gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Women division with female gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Men 18+ division with male gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns an empty division for an unknown name
DivisionService save calls DataService.put when divisionId is not 0
DivisionService save calls DataService.post when divisionId is 0
DivisionService delete calls DataService.delete with the correct URL
DivisionService getmatchingDivision returns the canonical name when there is a case-insensitive match
DivisionService getmatchingDivision returns "Other" when there is no match
DivisionService setLoadingIndicator updates the isLoading state signal
GameService should be created
GameService validateScores returns true for two valid integer scores
GameService validateScores returns true for boundary scores of 0 and 0
GameService validateScores returns true for boundary scores of 150 and 150
GameService validateScores returns false when home score exceeds 150
GameService validateScores returns false when visitor score is negative
GameService validateScores returns false for non-integer scores
GameService validateScores returns false for NaN
GameService validateScores returns false for Infinity
GameService compare returns negative when a < b ascending
GameService compare returns positive when a > b ascending
GameService compare returns positive when a < b descending
GameService extractDate converts an ISO date string to a JS Date
GameService updateSelectedGame sets the selectedGame
GameService clearSelectedGame resets selectedGame to null
GameService updateSeasonGames stores the games in the internal signal
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate groups games that share the same calendar date
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate returns an empty array for empty input
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate creates one group per unique date
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns only games matching the selected division
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns games sorted by gameDate ascending
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns empty array when no seasonGames are loaded
GameService filterGamesByTeam emits an empty array when no team is selected
GameService seasonGamesCount returns 0 when no games are loaded
GameService seasonGamesCount returns the count of loaded season games
GameService fetchSeasonGames does nothing when no season is selected
GameService fetchSeasonGames GETs season games and updates the signal
GameService saveGame PUTs to the scores endpoint and updates selected game optimistically
